offense_profile.label: Efficiency Optimizer
offense_profile.strategic_intent: Protect success rate with low-risk underneath and play-action answers after the defense declares structure.
expected_behavior: conservative offense risk on every call
quick_game plus play_action_flood >= 20 calls across seed pack
no vertical_shot calls across seed pack

defense_profile.label: Man-Coverage Bully
defense_profile.strategic_intent: Challenge long downs with assertive man calls while still fitting run and bracket reactions.
expected_behavior: aggressive defense risk >= 6 calls across seed pack
redzone_bracket plus bear_front >= 26 calls across seed pack
